riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)

causalAutopsy.notes: installBuiltinJobs has always regenerated .instar/jobs/instar/<slug>.md from the shipped template on every update while preserving the enabled flag in .instar/jobs/schedule/<slug>.json — but nothing in the agent-facing surface said so, and the .md carries a visible enabled: line that reads as the control. Surfaced 2026-07-23 when an edit to the .md reverted ~20 minutes later on a live machine; I then concluded from that single failed attempt that NO durable path existed and escalated a false blocker to the operator. Documentation gap, not a code defect.
